title: ConvertKit vs Sendinblue (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare ConvertKit vs Sendinblue. Find out which email marketing tool suits your needs, pricing, and features.
h1: ConvertKit vs Sendinblue: Detailed Comparison for 2025
intro: ConvertKit and Sendinblue (now Brevo) are both popular email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. ConvertKit focuses on creators and course sellers with robust automation and landing pages, while Sendinblue excels at transactional email, SMS, and multi-channel campaigns. Choosing between them depends on your business model and communication needs.
choose_a_if: You're a creator, blogger, or course seller needing landing pages and commerce features
You prioritize ease of use and creator-focused tools over multi-channel capabilities
You want a 30% recurring affiliate commission for 24 months
choose_b_if: You need a generous free tier with up to 100,000 subscribers
You want SMS, WhatsApp, and transactional email capabilities in one platform
You require CRM and chat features alongside email marketing
You send high volumes of transactional emails

faq.a: Neither is objectively better—it depends on your needs. ConvertKit excels for creators with its landing pages and visual automation builder. Sendinblue (Brevo) is superior for businesses needing multi-channel marketing, SMS, and transactional email at a lower cost. Check your specific requirements to decide.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ConvertKit or Sendinblue?
faq.a: Sendinblue is significantly cheaper if you're starting out, offering 100,000 free subscribers versus ConvertKit's 1,000. Paid plans are comparable ($25 vs $29/month), but Sendinblue's free tier with 300 emails/day makes it better for budget-conscious businesses. ConvertKit offers better long-term affiliate earnings at 30% recurring commission.

faq.q: Can I switch from Sendinblue to ConvertKit?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support CSV imports and integrations with migration tools. Most email service providers allow you to export your subscriber lists. However, you'll need to rebuild automations and landing pages manually in ConvertKit, as these aren't typically transferable between platforms.
